title: Donkey Kong
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1981 arcade design; genre evidence from live Nintendo eShop Arcade Archives DONKEY KONG Switch listing, observed 2026-07-13.
moat: Four-board barrel climbs price jump timing against score ladders in a fixed-kit loop.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: A short board cycle and one jump verb sustain competitive score chase without campaign systems.
exemplar_rationale: Arcade platformer that isolates pure execution and score-attack structure.

evidence.claim: Nintendo eShop product genres field listed: Action.
